TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Tjailjaking, title = Tjailjaking, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tjailjaking} }

S.FORM: Tjailjaking i Pingtung a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Tjailjaking. u kasalumaluma' nu Tjailjaking sa, 240 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 875 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 820 ku tademaw, pakalatu 94%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 55 ku tademaw, pakalatu 6%. u kasabinacadan, Paiwan 84%, Rukai 2%, Bunun 1%, Puyuma 1%, zumazuma 5%.
S.PHON: tjair~ɾjakiŋ i piŋtuŋ a kuwan nu kar~ɾinku ku nijazuʔ~ʡ nu tjair~ɾjakiŋ. u kasar~ɾumar~ɾumaʔ~ʡ nu tjair~ɾjakiŋ sa, *** ku r~ɾumaʔ~ʡ. kumud nu kasabinawr~ɾan sa, *** ku tadəmawan. kasabinawr~ɾan nu iŋʦumin sa, *** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu **%. u zuma sa, ʦaj ku iŋʦumin, ** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu *%. u kasabinaʦadan, paiwan **%, *ukai *%, bunun *%, pujuma *%, zumazuma *%.
S.FORM: Tjailjaking i Pingtung a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Tjailjaking. u kasalumaluma' nu Tjailjaking sa, 240 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 875 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 820 ku tademaw, pakalatu 94%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 55 ku tademaw, pakalatu 6%. u kasabinacadan, Paiwan 84%, Rukai 2%, Bunun 1%, Puyuma 1%, zumazuma 5%.
S.PHON: tjair~ɾjakiŋ i piŋtuŋ a kuwan nu kar~ɾinku ku nijazuʔ~ʡ nu tjair~ɾjakiŋ. u kasar~ɾumar~ɾumaʔ~ʡ nu tjair~ɾjakiŋ sa, *** ku r~ɾumaʔ~ʡ. kumud nu kasabinawr~ɾan sa, *** ku tadəmawan. kasabinawr~ɾan nu iŋʦumin sa, *** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu **%. u zuma sa, ʦaj ku iŋʦumin, ** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu *%. u kasabinaʦadan, paiwan **%, *ukai *%, bunun *%, pujuma *%, zumazuma *%.
